title: podman pull image always failed with error "connect: connection refused"
body:
Hello,

I am doing redhat 7.9 upgrade to Rocky8 /redhat 8.8 release.

# podman --version
podman version 4.6.1

the image was built by docker command, then run with podman.
during VNF qcow2 image build,  we use "podman load -i <image>" command to load the image,  I saw the prefix added before the original image name like the following:

Loaded image: localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204

after the installation of VNF qcow2 image, 
# podman images
REPOSITORY                             TAG           IMAGE ID      CREATED      SIZE
localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db  23.11.1-9204  b358e5cbe7fb  2 hours ago  898 MB

# podman pull cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204
Trying to pull localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204...
WARN[0000] Failed, retrying in 1s ... (1/3). Error: initializing source docker://localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused
WARN[0001] Failed, retrying in 1s ... (2/3). Error: initializing source docker://localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused
WARN[0002] Failed, retrying in 1s ... (3/3). Error: initializing source docker://localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused
Error: initializing source docker://localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused

# podman pull localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204
Trying to pull localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204...
WARN[0000] Failed, retrying in 1s ... (1/3). Error: initializing source docker://localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused
WARN[0001] Failed, retrying in 1s ... (2/3). Error: initializing source docker://localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused
WARN[0002] Failed, retrying in 1s ... (3/3). Error: initializing source docker://localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused
Error: initializing source docker://localhost/cenotificationservice_no_db:23.11.1-9204: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused

This error blocked the redhat upgrade now.

Any idea about this error?
